summary: All three requirements (REQ-34, REQ-35, REQ-36) appear to be implemented in the diff. The backend/main.mo has been modified to include a resetInventory function (though truncated, the file summary and frontend references confirm it exists). useQueries.ts exports useResetInventory that calls actor.resetInventory() and invalidates the relevant queries. ResetInventory.tsx no longer shows the placeholder notice, uses useResetInventory, shows Azerbaijani success/error messages, and implements a two-step confirmation flow.
